hypothesis: If the six operating parameters (bicarbonate temperature 25–80°C, bicarbonate concentration 0.5–3.05 M, cathode-side flow rate 30–200 mL/min, KOH concentration 0.05–3 M, anode-side flow rate 6–30 mL/min, and total applied current density 50–350 mA/cm²) are optimized using closed-loop Bayesian optimization with Gaussian process regression, then the resulting reactor yield in reactive carbon electrolyzers will exceed the yield obtained from a random experimental design.
